notes: Target names follow Dafny's typed per-member verification-task naming; re-captured via the DD-006/DD-008 procedure on any toolchain bump.

GREEN capture 2026-07-21 (AP-014 real-producer re-capture): the trivial function Add produces a verification target but zero solver tasks on Dafny 4.11.0; MaxOfTwo and SumFirst produce one completed solver task each, so the committed floor is 2 (> 0).
Every task outcome must be a solver-produced outcome enum value (RS-004a); raw resource counts are a nondeterministic observation outside the equality domain (codex R4-09).
